_comment: Reference websites per design style. Entries are split into 'sites' (real brand/product pages) and 'galleries' (curation/inspiration platforms). Used by capture-references.mjs — screenshots are local-only. DO NOT commit public/references/.

sites.title: Linear
sites.note: Muted palette, spacious layout, sharp typography, and restrained product surfaces define modern SaaS minimalism.

sites.title: Apple
sites.note: Generous white space, product-first composition, neutral color, and very low visual noise anchor premium minimalism.

sites.title: Stripe
sites.note: Precise grid rhythm, restrained copy density, thin dividers, and controlled accent use show minimalism for complex B2B content.

galleries.title: Pinterest - Web Design Inspiration Minimalist
galleries.note: Moodboard reference for white space, neutral palettes, thin rules, sparse product imagery, and quiet composition patterns.

galleries.title: Awwwards - Minimalist Websites
galleries.note: Award-gallery reference for high-quality minimal web execution, interaction restraint, layout proportion, and typographic detail.

galleries.title: Dribbble - Minimalist Website
galleries.note: UI reference for minimal cards, interface hierarchy, button restraint, muted surfaces, and component-level visual vocabulary.

sites.title: Bauhaus-Archiv / Museum für Gestaltung
sites.note: Historical design institution reference for functional typography, modular information, black structure, and modernist graphic discipline.

sites.title: MoMA
sites.note: Museum reference for modernist institutional hierarchy, large type, direct navigation, and rational event/content modules.

sites.title: Vitra
sites.note: Product and furniture reference for modernist object culture, functional categories, clear grids, and disciplined product storytelling.

sites.title: AIM - AI Modernism of Kharkiv
sites.note: Contemporary web reference for explicit modernist graphics, strong typography, geometric composition, and structured digital storytelling.

galleries.title: Pinterest - Modernism
galleries.note: Moodboard reference for modernist graphic layouts, geometric marks, primary color accents, asymmetric grids, and poster-like structure.

galleries.title: Awwwards - Modern Websites
galleries.note: Gallery reference for contemporary modern web execution, including architecture, cultural, and modernist-coded digital projects.

galleries.title: Dribbble - Modernist
galleries.note: UI and graphic reference for modernist interface modules, geometric symbols, strict grids, and high-contrast typography.

sites.title: Balenciaga
sites.note: 패션 브루탈리즘 — 검정 배경, 굵은 산세리프, 각진 레이아웃

sites.title: Brutalist Websites
sites.note: 브루탈리즘 전문 갤러리 사이트 — 실제 예시 풍부

sites.title: Bloomberg
sites.note: 에디토리얼 브루탈리즘 — 높은 정보 밀도, 굵은 타이포

sites.title: Cyberpunk 2077 Official
sites.note: 네온, 글리치, 다크 배경 — 장르 정의 사이트

sites.title: Razer
sites.note: 그린 네온 + 블랙 — 게이밍 사이버펑크 대표

galleries.title: Dribbble — Cyberpunk Website

sites.title: Swissinfo

sites.title: SBB 스위스 철도

sites.title: Muji
